assertions.title: Standard completions without echo or prompt_logprobs are unaffected

steps.observed: No logprobs key present, all required fields present: id=cmpl-b67cf3f0, object=text_completion, model=Gemma-4-26B-A4B-it-JANG_4M
No logprobs key present, all required fields present: id=cmpl-e58db864
No logprobs key present, all required fields present: id=cmpl-49471032
No logprobs key present, all required fields present: id=cmpl-acf09b32
No logprobs key present, all required fields present: id=cmpl-06bee3d6

evidence.analysis: All 5 responses confirmed: (1) no logprobs key present, (2) all standard fields present (id, object, created, model, choices, usage). Response shape is identical to pre-echo-feature behavior.

assertions.title: Streaming echo emits prompt tokens as deltas before completion

steps.expected: SSE stream with prompt deltas first, then completion deltas, then [DONE]
steps.observed: 24 SSE chunks received. Chunk 0: text='Hello world' (prompt echoed). Chunk 1: logprobs with 24 prompt template+text tokens. Chunks 2-21: completion deltas (<|channel>thought\nHello! How can I help you). Chunk 22: finish_reason=length. Chunk 23: [DONE].

steps.action: Verify prompt text appears before completion text in deltas
steps.expected: First delta contains prompt text, subsequent deltas contain completion
steps.observed: First delta (chunk 0) text='Hello world' contains the full prompt. Completion deltas start from chunk 2 with '<|channel>' then 'thought' then '\n' then 'Hello' then '!' etc.

steps.action: Verify logprobs present in prompt-delta chunks
steps.expected: logprobs field present in chunks containing prompt tokens
steps.observed: Chunk 1 has logprobs with 24 tokens including template tokens (<bos>, <|turn>, user, \n) and prompt tokens (Hello,  world). token_logprobs[0] is null as expected.

steps.expected: data: [DONE] is the final SSE frame
steps.observed: data: [DONE] is chunk 23 (last chunk), confirming proper stream termination.

evidence.analysis: SSE stream captured with 24 chunks. Prompt text 'Hello world' in first delta. First logprobs chunk contains 24 tokens (template + prompt). token_logprobs[0]=null. Completion tokens follow prompt tokens. [DONE] frame is final. All criteria met.

assertions.title: max_tokens: 0 with echo returns only prompt logprobs

steps.expected: Response with only prompt token logprobs, no completion tokens
steps.observed: Server returned 200 OK. usage.completion_tokens=0, usage.prompt_tokens=26, tokens array length=26, choice.text='The quick brown fox'

steps.action: Assert tokens length equals prompt_tokens from usage

evidence.analysis: max_tokens:0 accepted without error. tokens array has 26 entries matching prompt_tokens=26. token_logprobs[0]=null. completion_tokens=0. choice.text contains only echoed prompt 'The quick brown fox'. All criteria met.

summary: Tested 3 assertions: all 3 passed. VAL-ECHO-006: 5 normal completions confirmed no logprobs key and all standard fields present. VAL-ECHO-009: Streaming echo correctly emits prompt deltas before completion deltas with logprobs, and [DONE] is last. VAL-ECHO-011: max_tokens:0 with echo+logprobs returns only prompt tokens (26 tokens matching prompt_tokens count, token_logprobs[0]=null, 0 completion tokens).
